title: Refuse polymorphic; build three join tables
prompt: The file test_fixtures/polymorphic_rails_style.ex has the Rails polymorphic anti-pattern (imageable_type, imageable_id). Rewrite MyApp.Media.Image and its migration to use three separate join tables: users_images, posts_images, comments_images. Each join table has FK references to its parent with cascade delete + a unique_index on the pair. Image schema declares many_to_many to each parent. Write image schema to lib/my_app/media/image.ex and the new migration to priv/repo/migrations/20260413100000_create_images_with_join_tables.exs.
tier_rationale: Multi-file refactor with synthesis of associations + migrations + unique indexes. Hard because the full join-table pattern must be applied consistently across three parent types.
research_citation: Ecto Polymorphic Associations guide: 'breaks database references... leads to an inconsistent database.'
